This repo has been developed on Culture Aware Sentiment Analysis under the guidance of Saurav Sir authored by Raunak Raj.
This project aims to analyze sentiments of sentences by open source AI models on Indian Context. 
As of June 23 2026 at 4:24 PM IST the model tested is Qwen 3.5 on 1.7 Billion parameters. 
The analysis was made on the dataset available at Raunak/cultural_sensitive_data_Hindi(1).csv 

The mode of Analysis:
The analysis was mad ein several steps. 
Sentences from Raunak/cultural_sensitive_data_Hindi(1).csv were taken for each Region.
Three states were considered randomly from each region through a Python Program. 
AN effective dataset for the study was thus generated at Raunak/data.csv. 
The file data.csv was fed into pipelines for each model. 

The models tested are mentioned as follows:
    1. Qwen 3.5 
    2. LLama
    3. Gemma
    4. Mistral

Their respective outputs were saved. 

An analysis to all of them were made, presented and saved.
